title: Approval route status
copy: Shows whether the user is leaning toward full plans, building notice, competent person scheme, registered building control approver, local authority or BSR route.

title: Likely Approved Document flags
copy: Lists triggered Parts and why each one may matter.

title: Inspection timeline
copy: Shows expected inspection stages, whether each stage is done, and which evidence is still missing.

title: Evidence folder
copy: Metadata log for photos, drawings, calculations, certificates and commissioning records.

title: Certificate chaser
copy: Tracks certificates expected from building control or competent person schemes.

title: Project downloads
copy: Lists generated checklists and pack downloads for the selected project.

title: Source re-check
copy: Warns when saved project data may be stale or Part L/F version sensitive.
